zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywelyn ab Iorwerth於1174年出生在威爾士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素時，他的父親Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd45歲，母親Margaret de Powys41歲。他於1204年3月23日與Joan Lady of Wales結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1194年登記服兵役。他去世於1240年4月11日在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾康維享年66歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾康維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywelyn ab Iorwerth于1174年出生在威尔士安格萊阿福拉福 卡素时，他的父亲Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd45岁，母亲Margaret de Powys41岁。他于1204年3月23日与Joan Lady of Wales结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1194年登记服兵役。他去世于1240年4月11日在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾康維享年66岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾康維。

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Mabel .   See also  Maeve .

en.lifeSummary: When Llywelyn ab Iorwerth was born in 1174, in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd, was 45 and his mother, Margaret de Powys, was 41. He married Joan Lady of Wales on 23 March 1204. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1194. He died on 11 April 1240, in Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywelyn ab Iorwerth est né en 1174, à Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Powys, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Joan Lady of Wales le 23 mars 1204. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1194. Il est décédé le 11 avril 1240, à Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywelyn ab Iorwerth 1174 in Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd 45 und seine Mutter Margaret de Powys 41. Er hat am 23. März 1204 Joan Lady of Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1194 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. April 1240 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ab Iorwerth è nato il nel 1174 nel Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Powys, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Joan Lady of Wales il 23 marzo 1204. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1194. Morì il 11 aprile 1240, nel Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ab Iorwerthが1174年にウェールズアングレセイアバーフラウ カストルで生まれた時，父Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwyneddは45歳，母Margaret de Powysは41歳であった。1204年3月23日にJoan Lady of Walesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1194年に兵役登録をした。彼は1240年4月11日にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアコンウイで66歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアコンウイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywelyn ab Iorwerth(이)가 1174년 웨일스 앤글레시 압르프롤 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Powys(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1204년 3월 23일 Joan Lady of Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1240년 4월 11일 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 콘w이에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 콘w이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywelyn ab Iorwerth nasceu em 1174, em Aberffraw Castle, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Powys, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Lady of Wales em 23 de março de 1204. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1194. Ele faleceu em 11 de abril de 1240, em Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywelyn ab Iorwerth родился в 1174 г. в местности абирффрав кастл, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Powys, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Lady of Wales 23 марта 1204 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. В 1194 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 апреля 1240 г. в местности конви, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности конви, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywelyn ab Iorwerth nació en 1174, en Aberffraw Castle, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Iorwyth Drywyndn Lord of Gwynedd, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret de Powys, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Joan Lady of Wales el 23 de marzo de 1204. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1194. Murió el 11 de abril de 1240, en Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
